name: CENTRAL PACIFIC FINANCIAL CORP
summary: PARTI General Central Pacific Financial Corp. is a Hawaii corporation and a registered bank holding company under the Bank Holding Company Act of 1956, as amended (the "BHC Act"). CPF was organized on February1, 1982, and serves as the holding company for its principal subsidiary, Central Pacific Bank. The Bank was incorporated in its present form in the State of Hawaii on March16, 1982, following a holding company reorganization.
